# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const MAX_CONTENT_SIZE = 10 * 1024 * 1024;
const MAX_CHUNK_SIZE = 64 * 1024;
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 60000;
const MAX_REQUESTS_PER_WINDOW = 100;

const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();

function getClientIdentifier(request: NextRequest): string {
  const forwarded = request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for');
  const ip = forwarded ? forwarded.split(',')[0].trim() : 'unknown';
  return ip;
}

function checkRateLimit(identifier: string): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const record = rateLimitMap.get(identifier);

  if (!record || now > record.resetTime) {
    rateLimitMap.set(identifier, {
      count: 1,
      resetTime: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW,
    });
    return true;
  }

  if (record.count >= MAX_REQUESTS_PER_WINDOW) {
    return false;
  }

  record.count++;
  return true;
}

function sanitizeHeaders(headers: Record<string, string>): Record<string, string> {
  const allowedHeaders = [
    'content-type',
    'cache-control',
    'x-custom-header',
    'x-stream-id',
  ];
  
  const sanitized: Record<string, string> = {};
  
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
    const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
    
    if (allowedHeaders.includes(normalizedKey)) {
      const sanitizedValue = String(value)
        .replace(/[\r\n]/g, '')
        .substring(0, 1024);
      
      sanitized[normalizedKey] = sanitizedValue;
    }
  }
  
  return sanitized;
}

function validateContent(content: unknown): string[] {
  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
    throw new Error('Content must be an array');
  }
  
  if (content.length === 0) {
    throw new Error('Content array cannot be empty');
  }
  
  if (content.length > 10000) {
    throw new Error('Content array too large');
  }
  
  const chunks: string[] = [];
  let totalSize = 0;
  
  for (const item of content) {
    if (typeof item !== 'string') {
      throw new Error('All content items must be strings');
    }
    
    const chunk = item.substring(0, MAX_CHUNK_SIZE);
    totalSize += chunk.length;
    
    if (totalSize > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
      throw new Error('Total content size exceeds limit');
    }
    
    chunks.push(chunk);
  }
  
  return chunks;
}

async function createStreamingResponse(
  chunks: string[],
  delay: number
): Promise<ReadableStream<Uint8Array>> {
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  let index = 0;

  return new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (const chunk of chunks) {
          if (index > 0 && delay > 0) {
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, Math.min(delay, 5000)));
          }
          
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          index++;
        }
        
        controller.close();
      } catch (error) {
        controller.error(error);
      }
    },
    
    cancel() {
      console.log('Stream cancelled by client');
    },
  });
}

export default async function handler(request: NextRequest) {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Method not allowed' },
      { status: 405 }
    );
  }

  const clientId = getClientIdentifier(request);
  
  if (!checkRateLimit(clientId)) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Rate limit exceeded' },
      { status: 429, headers: { 'Retry-After': '60' } }
    );
  }

  try {
    const contentType = request.headers.get('content-type') || '';
    
    if (!contentType.includes('application/json')) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Content-Type must be application/json' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const body = await request.json();
    
    if (!body || typeof body !== 'object') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Invalid request body' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const { content, headers: userHeaders, delay = 100 } = body;

    const chunks = validateContent(content);
    
    const sanitizedHeaders = userHeaders 
      ? sanitizeHeaders(userHeaders) 
      : {};

    const delayMs = Math.min(Math.max(Number(delay) || 100, 0), 5000);

    const stream = await createStreamingResponse(chunks, delayMs);

    const responseHeaders = new Headers({
      'Content-Type': sanitizedHeaders['content-type'] || 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      'Cache-Control': sanitizedHeaders['cache-control'] || 'no-cache, no-transform',
      'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
      'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
      'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
      'Referrer-Policy': 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin',
    });

    if (sanitizedHeaders['x-custom-header']) {
      responseHeaders.set('X-Custom-Header', sanitizedHeaders['x-custom-header']);
    }
    
    if (sanitizedHeaders['x-stream-id']) {
      responseHeaders.set('X-Stream-Id', sanitizedHeaders['x-stream-id']);
    }

    return new Response(stream, {
      status: 200,
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });

  } catch (error) {
    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Internal server error';
    
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: errorMessage },
      { 
        status: 400,
        headers: {
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
        }
      }
    );
  }
}
